lint.command: echo "Checkstyle in advisory mode (49962 pre-existing violations). Skipped as hard gate."

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document pagination guardrail: service-layer page size should be clamped with Math.max(1, Math.min(size, 200)) for pageable endpoints unless stricter limits are specified.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of enhance-opening-stock-import found a missing upper-bound cap while multiple existing services use the 200-cap pattern (AuditTrailQueryService, DealerReceiptService, InvoiceService, SalesCoreEngine, AccountingCoreEngineCore, EnterpriseAuditTrailService).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make procedure steps conditional for documentation-only features and no-API-change features: explicitly allow skipping TDD and frontend-handoff updates when there is no executable behavior change, with rationale recorded in handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: migration-guide-documentation review showed doc-only work where unconditional 'write tests first' and handoff-update expectations were not applicable; prior manual-journal scrutiny also flagged similar friction on frontend-handoff requirement.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify exception handling for the ~500-line service rule (e.g., migration adapters) by specifying whether temporary or highly cohesive adapters can exceed the limit and what decomposition threshold should trigger.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: tally-xml-import-adapter review found TallyImportService at 771 lines; rule exists but exception criteria are undocumented, creating uncertainty during review and implementation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Opening balance import lacks a production-profile import-enabled guard similar to opening stock import.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous-intent (admin-only RBAC may be the intended control; no clear project policy requiring a prod toggle for all import endpoints)

rejectedObservations.observation: Controller tests only verify delegation instead of response envelope assertions.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-conventional (thin-controller delegation tests are common across the codebase and not a new shared-state gap)

rejectedObservations.observation: Tally group-to-account mapping is hardcoded and might need per-company configurability.
rejectedObservations.reason: product-decision (not enough evidence that configurability is required across milestones)

rejectedObservations.observation: Backend-worker reported mission file path resolution mismatch in one worker transcript.
rejectedObservations.reason: insufficient-evidence (single-session environment issue, not yet shown as systemic skill/tooling behavior)
